name: John Wilkin
notes: Associate University Librarian for Publishing and Technology UMich; left HathiTrust 2013 to become Dean of Libraries / University Librarian U Illinois Urbana-Champaign; in 2024 became CEO of Lyrasis; received 2019 Hugh C. Atkinson Memorial Award

name: Mike Furlough
notes: Succeeded Wilkin; works closely with Board of Governors and Program Steering Committee; bears responsibility for membership engagement; based at University of Michigan

name: Paul Courant
role: Co-creator / UMich Dean of Libraries (founding period)
notes: UMich Provost 2002-2005; Arthur F. Thurnau Professor of Public Policy and Economics; key institutional commitment for Michigan to host HathiTrust

name: Beth Plale
notes: Indiana University Data to Insight Center; co-founded HTRC with U Illinois; HTRC sunsetting end of 2026

name: J. Stephen Downie
notes: University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign iSchool; co-founded HTRC

name: Mary-Jo K. Romaniuk
notes: University of Calgary; elected to 3-year term beginning January 1 2026

name: Lorrie McAllister
notes: Hofstra University; re-elected for 2 additional years on board

name: Jeremy York
notes: Author of "This is HathiTrust" early descriptive document

name: Heather Christenson
notes: Author of HathiTrust: A Research Library at Web Scale (LRTS 2011)
